title: Mandala's GUI - opaque buttons
description: Unofficial Mandala's GUI addon that updates the original Mandala's unavailable buttons and sliders to make it opaque
body:
# Desc
The resourcepack updates Mandala's unavailable buttons and sliders to make it opaque


### support (any amount :D if you want):
- USDC POL: **0x5ff2592c7336ebeeff958bebbff7794f06e049ee**
- USDT TRC20: **TBbuSqH3X4dnKhznfYwkg8peXobJdBVdmQ**
